title: VimFu — [p ]p Put with Indent
description: [p and ]p paste text like P and p but adjust the indent to match the current line. Auto-indented paste.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
def outer():
    x = 10
    y = 20
    def inner():
        a = 1
        b = 2
        return a + b
    return x + y

steps.say: Open bracket P and close bracket P paste like capital P and P but adjust the indent to match the current line.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: yank a line from inner function ---

steps.say: Yank the return line from the inner function. It has 8 spaces of indent.

steps.comment: --- Demo 2: paste with ]p at different indent level ---

steps.say: Move to the outer function and paste with close bracket P. Watch the indent adjust.
The line pasted with 4 spaces of indent. Matching the outer function. Regular P would keep 8 spaces.

steps.comment: --- Demo 3: undo and compare with regular p ---

steps.say: Undo and try regular P to compare.
See the extra indent? Regular P keeps the original spacing. Close bracket P fixes it.
Open bracket P and close bracket P. Paste with automatic indent adjustment. No more fixing whitespace.
